name_en: Top-tier Original M22960 Apple Green. A Buci shoulder bag crafted from the iconic grained Epi leather. This season introduces refined pastel colors, adding a soft and elegant touch to the spring silhouette. The small appearance and matching large resin buckle give the look a stylish and modern charm. Size: 24.5 x 15.5 x 9 cm
